diagnosis: Registry ParamDef named 'packet_count' generated --packet-count CLI flag; playbook passes --count 500. Renaming ParamDef to 'count' aligns the generated flag with the playbook, and updating the constructor parameter to 'count' keeps the class instantiation consistent.

files_changed.description: Renamed ParamDef 'packet_count' to 'count' in the udp-flood AttackEntry so the generated CLI flag is --count instead of --packet-count

Renamed constructor parameter 'packet_count' to 'count' (lines 101, 157, 181) so the factory's keyword-argument call attack_cls(count=...) resolves correctly; internal self.packet_count attribute is preserved
